raw.objective: “the resulting models could be used to simulate exposure at yet-to-be-tested doses and to bridge therapeutic dose range between these two drugs”
raw.observations: Low variability in dose-exposure (auc) and dose-bioavailable dose relationship. Dose-bioavailable dose relationship of gabapentin enacarbil is near-linear up to a dose of over 10000, but nonlinear for gabapentin, reaching absorption saturation around 4000-5000 mg/day
raw.dose: Mixed oral dosing in epileptic and other patients and healthy subjects
raw.equations: coeff1=theta1 power1=theta2 emax1=theta3 ED50_1=theta4 [Gabapentin Enacarbil] Mean exposure =(coeff1*DD**power1)*(1+eps1) [Gabapentin] Mean exposure =(emax1*DD/(ED50_1+DD))*(1+eps2) coeff2=theta5 power2=theta6 emax2=theta7 ED50_2=theta8 [Gabapentin Enacarbil] Mean daily bioavailable dose =(coeff2*DD**power2)*(1+eps3) [Gabapentin] Mean daily bioavailable dose =(emax2*DD/(ED50_2+DD))*(1+eps4) DD = Daily Dose
raw.parameter_values: theta1=0.0103 theta2=0.844 theta3=3370 theta4=16.9 theta5=0.7 theta6=0.925 theta7=3080 theta8=2340 sigma1=0.317 sigma2=0.261 sigma3=0.061 sigma4=0.292

extraction_target.residual_error: coeff1=theta1 power1=theta2 emax1=theta3 ED50_1=theta4 [Gabapentin Enacarbil] Mean exposure =(coeff1*DD**power1)*(1+eps1) [Gabapentin] Mean exposure =(emax1*DD/(ED50_1+DD))*(1+eps2) coeff2=theta5 power2=theta6 emax2=theta7 ED50_2=theta8 [Gabapentin Enacarbil] Mean daily bioavailable dose =(coeff2*DD**power2)*(1+eps3) [Gabapentin] Mean daily bioavailable dose =(emax2*DD/(ED50_2+DD))*(1+eps4) DD = Daily Dose

study.dose: Mixed oral dosing in epileptic and other patients and healthy subjects
study.objective: “the resulting models could be used to simulate exposure at yet-to-be-tested doses and to bridge therapeutic dose range between these two drugs”

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
